mappings.manage.monitor_detail.hidden_warning: This monitor is hidden and won't appear on status pages.

mappings.manage.analytics.intro: Add your analytics ID/Key here. You can add multiple analytics providers.
mappings.manage.maintenance_detail.create_card_de: Schedule a new maintenance window using iCalendar RRULE format

mappings.manage.maintenance_detail.recurring_time: Recurring maintenances will occur at this same time of day. The date pattern is configured below.

mappings.manage.maintenance_detail.status_during_: Select monitors and set their status during the maintenance window

mappings.manage.maintenance_detail.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this maintenance? All events will also be deleted.
mappings.manage.embed.title: Embed Generator
mappings.manage.embed.desc: Create customizable embeds to display the status or latency of your monitors on external websites
mappings.manage.embed.type_status_bar_desc: Shows a status bar with uptime percentage and daily status indicators
mappings.manage.embed.type_latency_desc: Shows a latency trend chart over time
mappings.manage.embed.type_events_desc: Shows ongoing incidents and maintenance events in real time
mappings.manage.embed.filter_monitors_desc: Select monitors to filter events. Leave empty to show all global events.
mappings.manage.embed.latency_metric_desc: Select which latency metric to display in the chart
mappings.manage.embed.format_iframe_desc: Use an iframe to embed the widget. Works on most websites.
mappings.manage.embed.format_script_desc: Use a script tag for dynamic embedding. May require CSP configuration.
mappings.manage.embed.preview_desc: See how your embed will look
mappings.manage.embed.select_monitor_hint: Select a monitor to preview the embed
mappings.manage.customizations.footer_desc: Customize the footer HTML of your status page. Use HTML to add links, text, and other content.
mappings.manage.customizations.colors_desc: Customize the colors used to represent different monitor statuses. Set separate colors for light and dark themes.
mappings.manage.customizations.font_desc: Customize the font used throughout your status page.
mappings.manage.customizations.font_family_helper: Must match the font-family name in the CSS
mappings.manage.customizations.font_file_helper: TTF, OTF, WOFF, or WOFF2. Max 2 MB.
mappings.manage.customizations.theme_desc: Configure the default theme and user preferences for your status page.
mappings.manage.customizations.theme_default_help: The theme that will be used by default when users visit your status page.
mappings.manage.customizations.theme_toggle_helpe: When enabled, users can switch between light and dark themes using a toggle button.
mappings.manage.customizations.announcement_desc: Configure a site-wide announcement message shown to visitors.
mappings.manage.customizations.announcement_resho: Leave empty to never reshow automatically
mappings.manage.customizations.announcement_cance: Allow users to dismiss the announcement.
mappings.manage.customizations.page_ordering_desc: Control the display order of pages in the page switcher. New pages will appear at the end of the list.
mappings.manage.customizations.page_ordering_enab: When enabled, pages will be displayed in the order below instead of the default creation order.
